questionHtml: Explain how autopsy and lesions can be used to identify the role of different brain parts.
markschemeHtml:
a. an autopsy occurs after death/post-mortem;

b. lesions occur in the brain because of injury/illness;

c. changes in function/behaviour can be attributed to damaged areas;

d. can be diagnosed using fMRI/CAT scan/PET scan;

e. one example e.g. damage to Broca’s area affects speech;

meta.title: Explain how autopsy and lesions can be used to identify the role of different brain parts.
breadcrumbLabels: Option A: Neurobiology and behaviour (Core topics)
